note: Production estimates from independent sources. USDA = USDA FAS Coffee Semi-Annual (ID2025-0039, Dec 2025); GAEKI = Indonesian Coffee Exporters Association (AEKI/GAEKI press releases); ICO = International Coffee Organization Coffee Market Report. GAEKI does not publish a wide-syndication production series; entries shown are association-cited figures or local-industry consensus. Static seed — refresh after each USDA semi-annual.
